faqs.question: What causes drain fly infestations in Harrison homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic buildup inside drains, particularly in kitchens, bathrooms, and basement floor drains. Harrison's mix of older and newer homes can develop these issues when drains aren't regularly cleaned. Standing water, slow drains, and organic matter create perfect breeding grounds for these pests.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Harrison?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Harrison take 1-2 hours depending on the size of your property and number of affected drains. Our technicians will inspect all potential breeding sites, treat the affected areas, and provide prevention recommendations. You'll typically see significant reduction within 2-3 days.

faqs.question: Is your drain fly treatment safe for Harrison families and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are safe for homes and businesses when applied by our licensed professionals. Our treatments target the source of the infestation in drains while maintaining safety for your family, pets, and the environment. We provide clear instructions for any necessary precautions.
